column6:
An event’s carbon footprint assessment aims to evaluate and report on its environmental impact in terms of greenhouse gas emissions, and to take steps to mitigate this impact.
Our solution We work with a trusted partner specialising in event carbon assessments. They provide us with a user-friendly interface to consolidate the carbon footprint of an event. We can enter all the information relating to the energy consumption of all stakeholders involved in your seminar (agency, suppliers, participants, etc.)
